comment: Design-system contract enforced by tools/check-styleguide-manifest.mjs against apps/desktop/src/styles.css. tokens/families mirror the @theme declarations bidirectionally; erasedNamespaces must keep their `--<ns>-*: initial` markers; accentUsageBudget caps accent-utility occurrences across the desktop source; allow entries (file + reason) exempt a file from the raw px/hex/inline-style source scan. themes.<name>.selector names a :root override block in styles.css whose --color-* set must EQUAL tokens exactly (oklch-only, no alpha/var) — a missing override token is a dark value silently painted on the light canvas. contrast pairs are COMPUTED (oklch -> linear sRGB -> WCAG luminance) for the base @theme AND every theme block, each asserted >= min. AAA tier (v0.1.5): the primary reading pairs — ink/canvas and ink/surface — carry min 7 (WCAG SC 1.4.6 body text) in both themes; the ink-muted and accent pairs deliberately stay at 4.5 — AAA is scoped honestly to body text, secondary ink and the accent-as-text remain AA. controlPrimitives arms the primitive-boundary scan: a raw JSX open-tag for one of `tags` carrying a literal className in a .tsx outside `home` is red — interactive controls render through the src/components primitives (Button/Input), and new control styling goes INTO the primitive; controlAllow entries (file + reason) are the reviewed escape, and stale entries (file gone, or no live match) are red. This file is write-guard-protected: extending the design system is a reviewed human diff of styles.css AND this manifest together.

allow.reason: the token source of truth: raw px appears only in token values and the focus outline

virtualized grid: the row window is positioned with an inline style transform/height (offset + total scroll height are runtime pixel values that no token utility can express); all colors/spacing remain tokens
